title: phacelia sericea subsp. idahoensis
intro: Phacelia sericea subsp. idahoensis, also known as Idaho phacelia, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phacelia sericea subsp. idahoensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
